features: Highly Effective - metal bristles are spaced closely so that each hair strand can be thoroughly inspected which provides maximal nitpicking.
Build-In Magnifying Glass ‚Äì an additional and highly useful feature that allows to inspect the hair carefully and easily spot all the nits.

Gentle on the Hair - rounded shape of bristles and double Grooved Teeth allows hair to glide easily between them without painful and unpleasant tugging, pulling or ripping out while still effectively clearing the hair from the nits.
Easy to Clean ‚Äì Just wash the comb under the water tap. The comb won‚Äôt rust from the water as it is made from high quality stainless steel and ABS plastic.
Perfect for Any Kind of Hair ‚Äì the comb works easy and perfectly for long and short hair, fine and thick hair, wet and dry hair.
description: Product Description Nit Combs - Stylish design both small and compact Remove Head Lice & Eggs - Easy to use for all hair types and hair conditions Made From Durable Plastic - Resistant material and easy to wash One With Magnifier Lens - Effective solution for continuous problems Directions 1. Inspect hair with the metal comb, ensuring close spacing for thorough inspection. 2. Use the magnifying glass to spot nits in the hair. 3. Clean the comb under running water after use, ensuring no rusting due to the high-quality materials. 4. Use the comb on any type of hair, including long, short, fine, thick, wet, or dry hair.
